message:
chore: Bump version to 1.2.0

Release 1.2.0 includes:
- 3D atom coloring fixes (element-based colors for ball-and-stick and surface modes)
- Overlay system fixes (AnalysisSidebar wiring, missing overlay components)
- CRT z-index fix (effects no longer obscure modals)
- Settings modal size enhancement
- Comprehensive UI styling (buttons, sidebar, micro-interactions)
- MatrixRain performance optimization (visibility detection, FPS reduction)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
